description: CompositionPurple round neck pleated top made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, surface embellishments with piped rosettes running from the shoulder to the chest, and black and metal faceted beads on a netted chestFittingRegularWash careMachine or hand wash separatelyUse mild detergent onlyDo not bleach or wringUse mild detergent onlyDry in shadeMedium ironSheek and stylish, this purple top is all that a lady needs to look fantabulous. The piped rosettes and metallic beads add to it a style of its own. Team this with shorts, skirts or jeans and stylish footwear available at myntra for that uber cool look.Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
